hooks.command: branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Cannot edit on main/master branch. Create a feature branch first: git checkout -b feature/your-feature"}'; exit 0; fi

bash -c 'FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); [[ -n "$FILE" && "$FILE" == *.swift ]] && command -v swiftformat >/dev/null 2>&1 && swiftformat "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; [[ -n "$FILE" && "$FILE" == *.py ]] && command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1 && ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; exit 0'
